title: Add rate limiting middleware
close_reason: Already implemented - Redis sliding window rate limiter with presets for API, auth, AI, webhook, and org-scoped limits

title: Add missing env vars (REDIS_URL, SENDGRID_API_KEY, etc)
close_reason: Added REDIS_URL, SENDGRID_API_KEY, VAPID keys, STRIPE keys, AI keys, EMAIL_FROM, AI_PROVIDER

title: Add webhook signature validation for Polar
close_reason: Polar webhook signature validation is already implemented with HMAC-SHA256 and timing-safe comparison in verifyWebhookSignature method

title: Add soft delete (deletedAt) to core models
close_reason: Already implemented - deletedAt field exists on User, Organization, Workspace, Project, TaskNode with proper indexes

title: Wire up AI decomposition modal
close_reason: Created AI decomposition modal with job polling, result display, and accept/reject UI

title: Add RBAC to AI routes
close_reason: RBAC guards already implemented - all AI routes have requirePermission() middleware applied with appropriate permissions (tasks:ai, tasks:read, tasks:update, admin:read)

title: Add IntegrationDefinition model to replace magic strings
close_reason: Added IntegrationDefinition model with IntegrationType enum, AuthType enum, and proper relations

title: Add RBAC to notification routes
close_reason: RBAC already properly implemented: 1) All notification routes protected by requirePermission() guards (notifications:read, notifications:manage, notifications:preferences, notifications:push), 2) Routes go through authMiddleware and tenantMiddleware at /api level, 3) All controller methods scope operations to authenticated user via getCurrentTenant().userId. No changes needed.

title: Add missing indexes to schema for query performance
close_reason: All required indexes already exist in the schema. Verified: TaskNode (4 indexes), TaskHistory (1 index), TaskAIDecision (1 index), Notification (1 index), AuditLog (1 index), IntegrationWebhookEvent (1 index). Schema validated with pnpm db:generate.

title: Add check constraints for confidence, depth, position fields
close_reason: Added check constraints for TaskNode.depth, TaskNode.position, TaskAIDecision.confidence via manual migration

title: Create command palette component using cmdk
close_reason: Created command palette component with Cmd+K shortcut, search, navigation commands

title: Create task Zustand store
close_reason: Task Zustand store already existed with comprehensive implementation including filters, selection, view mode, sorting, and expansion state. Added exports to stores index.
